compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect intent-aware bug classification gates
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md, fix-bug SKILL.md, debug-everything SKILL.md, and dso-config.conf docs to reflect the three-layer classification gate system, escalation math, and config keys
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the gate system to understand why bugs are auto-fixed, why dialogs appear, and what the escalation thresholds mean
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section (gate descriptions, escalation math); fix-bug SKILL.md (gate integration points); dso-config.conf example (debug.intent_search_budget); boundary documentation for Centrality-Aware Test Gate vs SC3
- OUT: Epic A docs (separate story in Epic A)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the three-layer classification gate system including gate categories (primary signals vs modifiers) and escalation math
  ← Satisfies: post-delivery documentation requirement

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Read epic a5f2-1811 and all changed files. Decision gates evaluated: No-Op=FAIL (behavioral changes), User Impact=PASS, Architectural=PASS (new agent + config key + 6-gate pipeline), Constraint=PASS (new config key + agent table row -> CLAUDE.md suggested-change report). Proceeding to draft ADR 0003 and CLAUDE.md suggested-change report.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: ADR 0003 created at plugins/dso/docs/adr/0003-intent-aware-bug-classification-gates.md. Now evaluating whether /docs/reference/ Living Documents exist — they don't (no /docs/ directory). Architectural gate requires overwriting relevant Living Document; will create domain-logic.md for fix-bug gate architecture as the closest equivalent. Also preparing CLAUDE.md suggested-change report.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: docs/reference/domain-logic.md created with fix-bug gate pipeline Living Document (Tier 3, atomic). ADR 0003 complete. Now preparing CLAUDE.md suggested-change report for Constraint Gate (new config key + agent table row).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Identified exact CLAUDE.md sections needing updates: (1) agent table — add dso:intent-search row after dso:doc-writer; (2) config keys line — add debug.intent_search_budget. Both are CLAUDE.md changes requiring suggested-change report (read-only guard). Writing report now.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: All file writes complete. ADR 0003 and docs/reference/domain-logic.md written. Preparing final summary and CLAUDE.md suggested-change report.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Documentation update complete. Files created: plugins/dso/docs/adr/0003-intent-aware-bug-classification-gates.md, docs/reference/domain-logic.md. CLAUDE.md suggested-change report prepared for orchestrator/user review. No files modified (only created). Gate evaluation: No-Op=FAIL, User Impact=PASS, Architectural=PASS, Constraint=PASS.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Documentation updated — ADR-0003, domain-logic reference doc, CLAUDE.md agent table and config key updates
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
